No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly includes activities like '董氏憂鬱症大專生版' (depression screening), '主觀幸福感量表及分析' (subjective well-being scale and analysis), and '提升幸福感的訓練' (happiness training), directly promoting mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university-level elective, the course directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly aims to develop academic knowledge, practical application skills, and critical thinking in personality psychology.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course includes a '工作價值觀量表' (Work Values Scale) and 'MBTI個人風格類型' (MBTI personal style type), which help students understand career preferences, indirectly supporting decent work and productive employment (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to sustainable cities and communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The study of the '黑暗三合體' (Dark Triad) personality traits offers a very weak and indirect link to understanding behaviors that could relate to violence or unethical conduct (Target 16.1).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to global partnerships for sustainable development.
